Multi-Agent Feedback Analyzer

This workflow uses three specialized AI agents to analyze customer feedback:

  1. Sentiment Analyzer - Detects emotional tone and sentiment
  2. Category Classifier - Categorizes feedback into topics
  3. Insights Generator - Creates actionable insights and suggested responses

Agent Outputs

Each agent uses structured output parsing to ensure consistent, machine-readable results that can be combined into a comprehensive analysis report.

Press enter or space to select a node. You can then use the arrow keys to move the node around, press delete to remove it and press escape to cancel.
Press enter or space to select an edge. You can then press delete to remove it or press escape to cancel.

We’ve been busy ✨

How likely are you to recommend n8n to a friend or colleague?

n8n AI

i want to multi agent ai feedback analyzer

explain how it works

This workflow analyzes customer feedback using three specialized AI agents working in parallel:

  1. Start trigger receives feedback text
  2. Three AI agents run simultaneously:
    • Sentiment Analyzer: Detects emotion (positive/negative/neutral), confidence score, and tone
    • Category Classifier: Assigns categories (product_quality, shipping, etc.) and extracts keywords
    • Insights Generator: Creates actionable recommendations, priority level, and a suggested customer response
  3. Combine Analysis merges all three agent outputs
  4. Final Report consolidates everything into a structured report with the original feedback plus all analysis results

Each agent uses structured output parsing to ensure consistent JSON results, and they all process the same feedback independently before their results are combined.
